children.text: Quick View Balance shows the current balance of up to two BB&T accounts you select. Once Quick View Balance is enabled, you'll select the two account balances you want to view on your home screen-prior to logging in with your User ID and Password.
To change the settings on your Quick View Balance, log on and go to your profile.
Start earning cash back when you pay with your BB&T Credit Card, Debit Card or MoneyAccount card.
